text: yo you doing anything sat? thinking of hitting up the lake

Hey mom, sorry! Work's been crazy busy, I'm doing okay though

yo jeff long time no see, how you been man
ha been good man, work's been kicking my ass but otherwise all good. you?
same old same old, we should grab beers soon it's been forever
heyyy stranger 👀 it's been forever, how are you
omg I know, work has been insane. how's the new apartment going?
finally unpacked lol, we need to get coffee soon and catch up for real
hey you 💕 just checking in, how's your day going?
busy but good! meetings all morning lol. you?
same old, miss you tho. dinner tonight?
